RuleSet.Name: src/schemapub/ISchemaPubSchema.java
RuleSet.Descr: Java 25 public interface for a $SchemaName$ schema.

GenFile.Name: fileSchemaPubISchemaJava
GenFile.BasePackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower SchemaName$pub/src/main/java
GenFile.SubPackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower SchemaName$pub

RuleSet.GenRule: //import $lower DefTopProjectName$.$lower DefVUnderVersion$.$lower DefSubProjectName$.$lower DefSchemaName$pub.buff.$DefSchemaName$PubBuffSchema; //import $lower DefTopProjectName$.$lower DefVUnderVersion$.$lower DefSubProjectName$.$lower DefSchemaName$pub.buff.$DefSchemaName$PubBuffFactoryService;

new $SecPubSchemaName$TableData("$DefSchemaName$", "$TableName$", $switch HasSuperClassRelation yes emitISchemaTableDataEntrySuperName default emitNull$, $switch HasHistory yes emitTrue default emitFalse$, $switch IsMutable yes emitTrue default emitFalse$, "$SecScope$", "$CodeVis$")$iterate TableSubClasses( each commaWalkISchemaPubTableDataEntry empty empty )$
static final AtomicReference<ApplicationContext> arApplicationContext = new AtomicReference<>(null);

public void bootstrapSchema($SecPubSchemaName$TableData tableData[]); public void bootstrapAllTablesSecurity(CFLibDbKeyHash256 clusterId, CFLibDbKeyHash256 tenantId, $SecPubSchemaName$TableData tableData[]);
$poptop SchemaDef iterate SchemaRefs( first emitSecSchemaPubName each empty empty emitOnlySchemaPubName )$
lookupOrdinal$popto EnumDef Name$.put( Integer.valueOf( $popto EnumDef Name$.$Name$.ordinal() ), $popto EnumDef Name$.$Name$ );
/** * Get the next $Name$ identifier. * * @return The next $Name$ identifier. * * @throws CFLibNotSupportedException thrown by client-side implementations. */ public short next$Name$();
/** * Get the next $Name$ identifier. * * @return The next $Name$ identifier. * * @throws CFLibNotSupportedException thrown by client-side implementations. */ public int next$Name$();
/** * Get the next $Name$ identifier. * * @return The next $Name$ identifier. * * @throws CFLibNotSupportedException thrown by client-side implementations. */ public long next$Name$();
/** * Get the next $Name$ identifier. * * @return The next $Name$ identifier. * * @throws CFLibNotSupportedException thrown by client-side implementations. */ public UUID next$Name$();
/** * Get the next $Name$ identifier. * * @return The next $Name$ identifier. * * @throws CFLibNotSupportedException thrown by client-side implementations. */ public CFLibUuid6 next$Name$();
/** * Get the next $Name$ identifier. * * @return The next $Name$ identifier. * * @throws CFLibNotSupportedException thrown by client-side implementations. */ public CFLibDbKeyHash128 next$Name$();
/** * Get the next $Name$ identifier. * * @return The next $Name$ identifier. * * @throws CFLibNotSupportedException thrown by client-side implementations. */ public CFLibDbKeyHash160 next$Name$();
/** * Get the next $Name$ identifier. * * @return The next $Name$ identifier. * * @throws CFLibNotSupportedException thrown by client-side implementations. */ public CFLibDbKeyHash224 next$Name$();
/** * Get the next $Name$ identifier. * * @return The next $Name$ identifier. * * @throws CFLibNotSupportedException thrown by client-side implementations. */ public CFLibDbKeyHash256 next$Name$();
/** * Get the next $Name$ identifier. * * @return The next $Name$ identifier. * * @throws CFLibNotSupportedException thrown by client-side implementations. */ public CFLibDbKeyHash384 next$Name$();
/** * Get the next $Name$ identifier. * * @return The next $Name$ identifier. * * @throws CFLibNotSupportedException thrown by client-side implementations. */ public CFLibDbKeyHash512 next$Name$();

/** * Get the $TableName$ Table interface for the schema. * * @return The $TableName$ Table interface for the schema. * * @throws CFLibNotSupportedException thrown by client-side implementations. */ public I$DefSchemaName$Pub$TableName$Table getTable$TableName$();
